items.title: Europeans Prepare for a More Dangerous World in a Time of Economic Upheaval
items.summary: A stalwart on defense spending, Poland is training its citizens in civil defense while balancing their jobs and families.
items.whyItMatters: It adds one useful signal to the current news mix without turning XLB into an overwhelming news feed.

items.title: US strikes Iranian fast boats as Iran attacks UAE oil facility
items.summary: Meanwhile shipping company Maersk said one of its US-flagged commercial vessels had successfully exited the Strait of Hormuz under US military protection.
